cookie.text: We use cookies to remember your preferences and improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our

hero.eyebrow: Norse Guidance · Nine Gods · Asa tro
hero.desc: VikingPal puts nine Norse gods in your pocket. Open a reflection door, step into a god's sanctum, or ask your own question — each answer costs one rune and speaks plainly.

about.title: Walk the old way.
about.subtitle: VikingPal is a Norse guidance app rooted in Asa tro — the ancient faith of the Norse gods. Nine gods, fifteen reflection doors, and guidance shaped by each deity's character and voice. Grounded, honest, and uncompromising.
about.f1_text: Swipe through nine Norse gods in a cinematic carousel. Each has their own sanctum — a dedicated space where you bring your question and receive guidance in that god's voice.
about.f2_text: Choose from daily guidance, strength and courage, trust, hope, skald wisdom, gratitude, family, purpose, and more. Each door opens guided reflection for one rune.
about.f3_text: Ask any open question and receive hall-honest, grounded guidance shaped personally to your situation — not a generic answer, but something built for you.
about.f4_text: Each question to the gods costs one rune. Start with 15 free runes, buy more any time, or claim 300 in one purchase with Ragnarök.
about.f5_text: VikingPal travels with wanderers everywhere. Broad language support ensures every seeker can walk the Norse path in their own tongue.
about.f6_text: Multi-god panel answers, a daily rune cast, and a daily god-focus quest — connected tools for those who go deeper into the halls.

features.title: Every tool for the Norse path
features.subtitle: Nine gods. Fifteen reflection doors. A rune for every question. Direct, grounded guidance shaped by Norse wisdom and Asa tro.
features.bible_text: A cinematic carousel of all nine gods — Odin, Thor, Loki, Freya, Tyr, Frigg, Balder, Heimdall, Njord. Tap any card to enter that god's sanctum and consult them directly.
features.prayer_text: Each god speaks in their own voice. Odin gives riddles. Thor is iron-direct. Loki finds the second reading. Freya names the cost. Enter and ask what you need to know.
features.reflection_text: Guided categories from daily guidance, strength, ritual reflection, hope in hard weather, gratitude, skald wisdom, and more. Each door costs one rune.
features.ask_text: Bring any question — purpose, relationships, courage, or life on the long road — and receive hall-honest guidance shaped to your situation and context.
features.selah_text: Cast a rune each day, read its meaning slowly, and commit to one concrete action before dusk. The runes do not soften what needs to be said.
features.letgo_text: Ask one question and receive a short answer from multiple gods in a single panel — useful when you want contrast, not a single voice telling you what you want to hear.
features.connected_text: One focused quest tied to a god's domain each day. Complete it with discipline and mark it done when the day turns.
features.study_text: Keep a ritual journal, browse hall lore and saga figures, find chants, and build a personal record of your walk through the Norse world.

journey.title: Choose. Ask. Receive.
journey.subtitle: Every consultation in VikingPal follows the same honest path — no noise, no filler, no comfortable half-truths.
journey.morning_text: Choose a reflection door or head straight to the Hall of Gods. Daily guidance, strength, gratitude, skald wisdom — pick what fits today's question.
journey.midday_text: Step into the god's sanctum. Ask what is actually on your mind. The gods speak plainly — they will not soften what needs to be said.
journey.evening_text: Read the guidance. Save it, share it, or let it sit. One rune spent, one answer earned. Return when you are ready to ask again.

verse.text: "Cattle die, kinsmen die, the self must also die. I know one thing which never dies: the reputation of each dead man."

plans.title: Wander free. Unlock Hrafnlaus or Ragnarök.
plans.subtitle: Every wanderer begins with 15 free runes and the full Hall of Gods. When you are ready — silence the ravens with Hrafnlaus, or ignite Ragnarök.
plans.wanderer_desc: Download VikingPal and start consulting the gods immediately. Fifteen starter runes, the full Hall of Gods, and all reflection doors — no cost, ad-supported.
plans.wanderer_f1: ✓   15 starter runes to consult the gods
plans.wanderer_f2: ✓   Hall of Gods — all 9 god sanctums
plans.hrafnlaus_price: One-time · No subscription · Restores across devices
plans.hrafnlaus_desc: Remove every advert from the halls. One payment, yours forever — walk the silent path without interruption.
plans.hrafnlaus_f1: ✓   No ads anywhere in the app
plans.hrafnlaus_f3: ✓   Restores across your iOS & Android devices
plans.ragnarok_price: One-time · No subscription · Restores across devices
plans.ragnarok_desc: Silence the ravens, ignite the world. One purchase removes every ad forever, claims 300 runes for the vault, and unlocks the cinematic Ragnarök theme across the entire app.
plans.ragnarok_f1: ✓   Ad-free forever — no ravens, no interruptions
plans.ragnarok_f2: ✓   300 runes — instantly added to your vault
plans.ragnarok_f3: ✓   Ragnarök theme — living fire-world on every screen
plans.note: ✦   VikingPal is free to wander. Hrafnlaus removes ads. Ragnarök adds the theme and 300 runes. No subscriptions — ever.

faq.title: Questions Before You Enter the Hall.
faq.a1: Yes. The Wanderer path is free and includes 15 starter runes, the full Hall of Gods, all fifteen reflection doors, your ritual journal, and hall lore. The app is ad-supported until you unlock Hrafnlaus or Ragnarök.
faq.a2: A rune is the currency of the hall. Each time you consult a god or open a reflection door, one rune is spent. You start with 15 free runes and can buy more any time — or claim 300 runes with the Ragnarök purchase.
faq.a3: Odin, Thor, Loki, Freya, Tyr, Frigg, Balder, Heimdall, and Njord. Each speaks in their own voice — oracular, thundering, mischievous, amber-warm, iron-honest, calm, light-clear, watchful, or tidal. Enter the sanctum of the one whose wisdom fits your question.
faq.a4: Daily hall guidance, trust and inner strength, ritual reflection, hope in heavy weather, forgiveness, love and compassion, strength and courage, gratitude, purpose and calling, family and relationships, peace and restless mind, skald wisdom, humility and character, overcoming temptation, and evening hall close. Each door costs one rune.
faq.q5: What is the difference between Hrafnlaus and Ragnarök?
faq.a5: Hrafnlaus is a one-time purchase that permanently removes every ad from the app. Ragnarök includes everything in Hrafnlaus — ad-free forever — plus 300 runes added to your vault and the cinematic Ragnarök theme. Both are one-time purchases with no subscription.
faq.q6: What does the Ragnarök purchase include?
faq.a6: Ragnarök is a one-time purchase that permanently removes every ad from the app, adds 300 runes to your vault, and unlocks the cinematic Ragnarök theme — a living fire-world with unique atmosphere on every screen. No subscription. Restores across your devices.
faq.a7: No. VikingPal does not sell subscriptions. You can wander for free with ads, unlock Hrafnlaus or Ragnarök once to remove ads (and claim runes with Ragnarök), or buy rune top-ups whenever you need more.

download.title:
Available Now on
iOS and Android.
download.desc: Download VikingPal and begin consulting the Norse gods — fifteen reflection doors, nine sanctums, and a rune for every question. The hall is open.

support.hero_subtitle: We are a small team and we care about every person who uses VikingPal. Find answers below, or reach us directly — we read every message.
support.about_title_html: Built with Care by OakDev & AI AB
support.about_p1: VikingPal is built by OakDev & AI AB, a small software company based in Uddevalla, Sweden. We are a team of developers and designers with a genuine passion for Norse mythology, history, and bringing the wisdom of the old gods into modern life.
support.about_p2: What began as a Norse guidance app has grown into a full Asa tro companion — nine god sanctums, fifteen reflection doors, a rune economy, and a cinematic Ragnarök theme — built with care for the wanderers who return to it every day.
support.about_p3: We approach this work with deep respect for Norse tradition and Asa tro. Every feature, every word, and every design decision is made with your journey through the halls in mind.
support.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about VikingPal. Can't find your answer? Send us a message.

footer.tagline: Walk with wisdom. The way of the Norse wanderer.

delete.title: Delete Your Account
delete.subtitle: You have the right to permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time — no questions asked.
delete.warning_title: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete.warning_body: Deleting your account will permanently erase all your data, your purchase entitlements, your rune balance, your ritual journal, and your reflection history. There is no grace period — once confirmed in the app, deletion begins immediately.
delete.methods_sub: The in-app method is the fastest and easiest.
delete.step1: Open the VikingPal app on your device.
delete.step2: Go to Settings (profile or menu area).
delete.step3: Scroll to the bottom of Settings.
delete.step5: Confirm the deletion. Your account and all data are permanently erased.
delete.estep3: Include the email address linked to your VikingPal account.
delete.estep4: We will process your request and confirm deletion within 30 days.
delete.data3: Your Hrafnlaus and Ragnarök purchase status
delete.data4: Your rune balance and purchase history
delete.data5: Your ritual journal and reflection history
delete.gdpr_body: As a user, you have the right to erasure ("right to be forgotten") under Article 17 of the GDPR. Deleting your account fully satisfies this right. If you have any questions about how your data is handled, please read our Privacy Policy or contact us at hello@oakdev.app.
delete.questions: Have questions or need help? We are here.
